name: TestGetByteInput
title: TestGetByteInput
description: After a dialog with byte input is closed you can use this function to get the input.

parameters.name: result
parameters.description: Some byte array you can save the input

return:
resultSize
Size of the byte array

example.code:
handle = TestWaitForByteInput("Test Text", "Test Caption", "Test Byte Input", 0);
TestGetByteInput(resultByte, elcount(resultByte));
